case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. MILDRED A MAYS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-31-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MAYS, MILDRED A AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-31-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
